feat.name: Security
feat.text: Those you shield can benefit from your lasting protection. You can cast *shields of the spirit* using 2 actions instead of 1. If you do, you can choose one ally in your champion's aura to gain a spirit shield that accompanies it. For 1 minute, that ally gains the benefits of *shields of the spirit*, even while the ally isn't in your champion's aura and even if your shield isn't raised. If you create another companion shield, any previous one ends.

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.
